name: main_menu
description_pt: Menu principal com botões Play, Settings e Quit em CanvasLayer. Configurável: cenas de destino, visibilidade dos botões. Emite sinais play_pressed, settings_pressed, quit_pressed.
description_en: Main menu with Play, Settings, and Quit buttons in a CanvasLayer. Configurable: target scenes, button visibility. Emits play_pressed, settings_pressed, quit_pressed signals.

parameters.name: play_scene
parameters.description_pt: Caminho da cena ao apertar Play.

parameters.name: settings_scene
parameters.description_pt: Caminho da cena ao apertar Settings.
